title: Mage - Cozy Cabins
description: A modpack that aims to improve your creative experience by adding new blocks, features etc.
body:
# **Let your creativity run wild**
Cozy Cabins is a modpack focused on making minecraft creative a much more interesting experience the only limit is your imagination 





![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97b3bfcc2e292e17a7993b5f799a52f1383d2a67.png)



# FEATURES
- New decorative blocks, More blocks to build with!
- Chunks load more smoothly, Makes builds in the distance look better!
- More block varieties, Better gradients!
- 1.21.4 features, Even though the packs 1.21.1!
- Cozy furniture, Perfect for a cozy cabin!
- Redstone pen, Just in case you want redstone!
- Chimneys and shutters, Perfect for houses!
- Nice looking clouds, Makes builds in the sky better!
- Block info with jade, Tells you what your looking at!
- Better menu, With fancy menu




### PERMISSIONS
YOU ARE ALLOWED TO DISTRIBUTE THE PACK VIA A LINK TO THIS PAGE, AlSO YOU ARE ABLE TO MAKE CONTENT ABOUT THE PACK, YOU ARE NOT ALLOWED TO DISTRIBUTE THE PACK OTHERWISE AND MAKE PROFIT OFF IT







## Make sure to check out my discord
https://discord.gg/6DKaMjjM
